title: armeria alpina subsp. fontqueri
intro: Armeria alpina subsp. fontqueri, also known as the Fontquer's Thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Armeria alpina subsp. fontqueri include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
